title: Deterministic Pipeline Workflow
description: Fixed workflow graph for pipeline orchestration. Each node has explicit entry/exit criteria. Agents execute bounded subtasks -- they don't decide what comes next. Project-type detection (project-detect.sh) determines deploy strategy at runtime.

pipeline.name: Implementation Design
pipeline.success_criteria: Step-by-step implementation plan with file paths

pipeline.name: TDD Implementation
pipeline.description: Red-green-refactor loop. Worker writes failing test, implements, verifies green.

pipeline.name: Auto-Commit
pipeline.description: Conventional commit with Co-Authored-By. Branch guard enforces feature branch.

pipeline.name: Parallel Code Review
pipeline.description: code-reviewer + security-reviewer + dependency-checker run in parallel. The actual reviewer agent is determined by project type at runtime (e.g., framework-specific reviewer vs generic code-reviewer).
pipeline._note: Replace 'code-reviewer' with a project-specific reviewer agent if needed. project-detect.sh can map: Python project -> python-reviewer, JS/TS project -> ts-reviewer, etc.

agents.name: code-reviewer
agents._note: Generic reviewer. Override per project type.

pipeline.success_criteria: All agents complete, no BLOCKING or FIX_CRITICAL verdict

pipeline.name: Auto-Deploy
pipeline.description: Deploy strategy is determined by project-detect.sh at runtime based on project marker files.

_project_detection.hooks.py: Framework app deploy (e.g., /deploy skill: build, push, backup, migrate, test)
_project_detection.package.json (standalone): Node app release (e.g., /release skill: version bump + tag + push)

pipeline.name: Pipeline Complete
pipeline.description: Write progress record, update task status, clean up workspace if applicable.
actions: Write progress JSON to pipeline output directory
If worktree: merge back and clean up

pipeline.name: Dead Letter Queue
pipeline.description: Task failed after retries. Capture full context for later review.
actions: Write failure JSON to DLQ directory with timestamp

pipeline.name: Escalate to Human
pipeline.description: Issue requires human judgment. Stop pipeline and report.
actions: Write escalation summary to DLQ directory
Report to user with full context

pipeline.name: Rollback
pipeline.description: Deploy failed after self-heal attempts. Restore previous state.

failure_actions.retry_once: Re-run the same node once. If still fails, escalate.
failure_actions.retry_once_then_dlq: Re-run once. If still fails, move to DLQ.
failure_actions.skip_and_warn: Skip node, emit warning, continue pipeline.
failure_actions.escalate_to_orchestrator: Stop pipeline, report to orchestrator for human decision.
failure_actions.route_to_fix: Return to TDD node with review feedback as input.
failure_actions.self_heal_3x_then_rollback: Attempt automated fix up to 3 times. On 4th failure, rollback.

bounded_execution.description: Every node has max_turns and timeout_seconds. If either limit is hit, the node fails and failure_action triggers. This prevents runaway agents.
